title: Exemption
doc_html:
§373.  Exemption

The provisions of this Chapter shall in no way prescribe other sections of law in regard to the cash management responsibilities of the state treasurer or the commissioner of administration.

Acts 1990, No. 468, §1, eff. July 1, 1990.
